promoText: Same day delivery in Bengaluru · Pickup at BTM 2nd Stage · +91 91647 79922
addressLines: below Canara Bank, opp. Metro Pillar 154,
parkingNote: Located on 20th Main near Metro Pillar 154 — look for Landmark building below Canara Bank. Street parking is usually available off-peak; message us if you're carrying large rigid boards so we can keep holding space ready.
